name: io.github.larsbaunwall/unlinked
description: MCP server that brings your LinkedIn professional profile and experience into your context.

environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn access token from the OAuth Token Generator. Accepts a bare token or 'Bearer <token>'. Required for EEA/Switzerland members only.

environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn API version in YYYYMM format (e.g. 202312). Defaults to 202312 when unset.
